findings.detail: buildManagedWorktreeGate（managed-worktree-gate.js）の独立refreshがverify flow / verify visual / review prepare / review closeで先に走り実同期を実行、後続reconcileがunchangedを永続化するためAC MWPR-S-4の監査保証が実CLI配線で破られる（standalone再現で実証）。single refreshコメントの不変条件はbuildExecutionState内にしか及ばない。

review_rounds.summary: fed325a0 resolves the masking: syncWorktreePolicySections writes a durable per-worktree stamp (.vibepro/policy-sync.json) at the moment a real sync happens, and every refresh attaches it as policy_sync.last_event. Reviewer re-ran the original reproduction with the exact real cli.js order (assertManagedWorktreeCommandAllowed -> reconcileExecutionState) against fed325a0: persisted state.json now carries last_event.status='synced'. New composed-flow e2e passes; 7/7 unit + 140/140 adjacent suites pass; docs updated accurately.

findings.detail: src/execution-state.jsの2コメント（48-50, 109-110）がpre-fixのsingle-refresh根拠のまま。現在の監査保護の正本は永続スタンプであり、コメント更新のfollow-upを推奨（non-blocking、現行正確性には影響なし）。coordinator対応: follow-upタスクとして起票済み。

review_rounds.judgment_delta: needs_changes -> pass because the durable per-worktree audit stamp decouples which refresh gets persisted from whether the sync event stays auditable, re-verified by rerunning the original masking reproduction at fed325a0

review_rounds.summary: Purely additive delta: display-only policy_sync rendering on the default text surface, plus two e2e tests — one exercising buildManagedWorktreeGate directly (the dominant real CLI call path the original masking bug was reproduced through), one pinning failed-sync visibility in renderExecutionStateSummary. 9/9 story tests + adjacent regression suites pass (exit 0). No boundary/gate/refresh logic change.
review_rounds.judgment_delta: pass(fed325a0) -> pass(78982951) because the delta only adds a text-rendering surface and automated e2e tests that make the previously manually-reproduced fix part of the permanent regression suite
